use_cases: Landing page hero section with animated ASCII art and canvas-based effects
Product showcase hero with UnicornStudio-powered animations
Software landing pages requiring distinctive animated hero visuals
ai_summary: A dynamic hero component featuring ASCII art styling powered by UnicornStudio canvas animations. The component loads third-party animation scripts and applies custom CSS to crop the canvas and hide branding elements. Ideal for SaaS and developer tool landing pages seeking modern, animated hero sections with a tech-forward aesthetic.
